Reports dating back to August 2025 have linked Nicolas Cage to the lead role of Henry Logan, a New York detective working cases in Jamaica Bay.
Coverage from Variety and Deadline suggests a deal may be close, though HBO has not confirmed the casting.
As of March 28, 2026, the network has declined to comment on the speculation surrounding Nic Cage's casting.
HBO drama chief Francesca Orsi recently confirmed that Season 5 will be set in New York, centered on Jamaica Bay.
Rust Cohle, played by Matthew McConaughey, carried a worldview defined by isolation and long-term exposure to violence.
True Detective Season 5 is targeting a 2027 release, with production expected to begin in 2026.

Reports confirm that the actor is in talks for the lead role, with the upcoming installment already generating anticipation ahead of production.
Deadline reported that Nicolas Cage is in talks for the lead role of Henry Logan, a New York detective at the center of the season's case.
Variety confirmed the new installment will take place in the Jamaica Bay area of New York City.
Production on the season is scheduled to start in 2026, with a planned 2027 premiere.
He will headline Amazon's Spider-Noir, a live-action series slated to debut in 2026."}]}
